title: SHZ Advanced Technologies Partners with JetZero for LH2 Storage and Distribution Solutions
content: JetZero, a pioneering start-up airframer developing the Z4, an all-wing design airplane that will deliver up to 50% better fuel efficiency and reduced emissions on conventional jet fuel, is partnering with SHZ Advanced Technologies to adapt SHZâ€™s existing, patented liquid hydrogen (LHâ‚‚) storage and distribution technologies for a potential Z4 variant. Under the agreement, JetZero and SHZ Advanced Technologies will work together under the NASA Advanced Aircraft Concepts for Environmental Sustainability 2050 (AACES) project to analyze and design technical storage and distribution solutions enabling the adaptation of LH2 in commercial air transport.
author: Analysts Account
